MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Tony Baldwin.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph Marino is present.
Attorney Eric Weisner representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-19-2011 is vacated.
